name: Soultearer Portent
duration: Until the next activation of the caster

name: Unholy Blessing
duration: Until the next activation of the caster

name: Veil of Despair
effect: Enemy models suffer a -2 penalty to their Leadership.
duration: Until the next activation of the caster

name: Illusory Supplication
effect: Hit rolls of 1-3 against target unit always fail.
duration: Until the next activation of the caster

name: Omen of Sacrifice
effect: The caster suffers 1 wound. Return one fallen model of attached unit to the battlefield.

name: Heretical Visions
duration: Until the next activation of the caster

name: Will of the Chaos Gods
effect: Target unit gets all benefits of all marks of chaos.
duration: Until the next activation of the caster

name: Warp Barrier
effect: Enemy psykers must reroll successful psychic tests. They suffer a "Peril of the warp" off of all doublets.
duration: Until the next activation of the caster

name: Benediction of Darkness
effect: Models count as if they were in cover.
duration: Until the next activation of the caster
